name: gogcli-mcp-calendar
description: Extended Google Calendar for Claude via gogcli — auth + Calendar events + Meet space management

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_calendar_events
tools.description: List calendar events with optional filters

tools.name: gog_calendar_get
tools.description: Get a specific calendar event

tools.name: gog_calendar_create
tools.description: Create a calendar event (optionally attach a Zoom meeting via withZoom)

tools.name: gog_calendar_update
tools.description: Update an existing calendar event (add/replace/remove Zoom meeting via withZoom/regenerateZoom/removeZoom)

tools.name: gog_calendar_delete
tools.description: Delete a calendar event

tools.name: gog_calendar_respond
tools.description: Respond to a calendar event invitation

tools.name: gog_calendar_run
tools.description: Run any gog calendar subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_calendar_calendars
tools.description: List the calendars in your calendar list

tools.name: gog_calendar_search
tools.description: Full-text search for events with optional time filters

tools.name: gog_calendar_freebusy
tools.description: Query free/busy intervals for one or more calendars

tools.name: gog_calendar_colors
tools.description: Show the available calendar and event color palette

tools.name: gog_calendar_acl
tools.description: List the access control list (sharing rules) for a calendar

tools.name: gog_calendar_move
tools.description: Move an event to another calendar

tools.name: gog_calendar_out_of_office
tools.description: Create an Out of Office event that auto-declines invitations

tools.name: gog_meet_create
tools.description: Create a Google Meet space

tools.name: gog_meet_get
tools.description: Get a Google Meet space by meeting code

tools.name: gog_meet_update
tools.description: Update a Google Meet space configuration

tools.name: gog_meet_end
tools.description: End the active conference in a Meet space

tools.name: gog_meet_history
tools.description: List past calls in a Meet space

tools.name: gog_meet_participants
tools.description: List participants from a Meet call

tools.name: gog_zoom_auth_setup
tools.description: Store Zoom Server-to-Server OAuth credentials (needed for calendar event Zoom attachment)

tools.name: gog_zoom_auth_doctor
tools.description: Validate stored Zoom Server-to-Server OAuth credentials
